untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires identification of two specific peaks (Adam tops A and B) with narrow inverted V-shapes, detection of the eve top component, and measurement of the lowest low between peaks. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and peak detection logic not available in the provided indicator set. The 'confirmation line' (lowest low between peaks) and validation that price does not rise above the higher peak require explicit peak tracking across multiple bars, which cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicators alone.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses pivot point (approximating confirmation line level) and volume confirmation as proxy signals, but this does not capture the true pattern mechanics. The signal fundamentally requires candlestick pattern recognition with multi-bar state tracking, which is outside the scope of single-bar indicator conditions. Success rate of 72% with 19% average decline and 8% failure rate at 5% threshold are noted but cannot be operationalized without proper pattern detection.
